projectDescription: Julian Reder's personal developer portfolio website — a Python-generated static site showcasing projects, skills, and experience as a Computer Engineering student at NCSU.
keyFeatures: Python-driven static site generator — all portfolio data defined in a single generator.py file
Dark mode support with automatic user preference detection
Interactive project cards with modal detail view and category filtering
Expandable skill bars with proficiency levels and related projects
Responsive layout with fixed sidebar on desktop
TailwindCSS styling with Inter font and Ionicons iconography
GitHub Pages deployment via htmlmin-minified output
publicApiSurface: PERSONAL_INFO — dict defining name, title, profile image, social links, contact details
ABOUT_ME — list of HTML paragraph strings for the about section
EXPERIENCES — list of timeline entries with icon, title, date, description
SKILLS — dict of skill categories, each a list of skill objects with name, level, percentage, details, projects
PROJECTS — list of project dicts with category, image, title, description, details, features, link, skills
generate_timeline_item(item) — renders a single experience timeline entry as HTML
generate_skill_bar(skill) — renders a skill bar with expandable details as HTML
generate_project_card(project) — renders a project card with hover effects and modal data as HTML
create_html_structure() — assembles all components into the final HTML document
